def negative_incremental_list_or_tuple_concatenation_in_accumulation_loop():
    rule_id = "incremental_list_or_tuple_concatenation_in_accumulation_loop"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag accumulation loops that repeatedly concatenate instead of appending and joining once."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
